Description: Controls how the waning effect values from multiple objects in **Effect_List** are combined. If set to 1, values are added together. If set to 0, values are multiplied. The resulting combined value must not exceed 1.
A list of waning effect objects defining how the intervention efficacy wanes over time. Each object is a waning effect class such as **WaningEffectBox** or **WaningEffectExponential**.
If set to 1, the intervention efficacy expires only when all effects in **Effect_List** have expired. If set to 0, the efficacy expires as soon as any one effect expires.
